# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: data-processor
    tier: backend
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-processor
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: data-processor
        tier: backend
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: data-processor-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: registry.example.com/data-processor:1.4.2@sha256:abc123def456
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          env:
            - name: APP_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: data-processor-secrets
                  key: db-password
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: config-volume
              mountPath: /etc/config
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "100Mi"
        - name: config-volume
          configMap:
            name: data-processor-config
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: data-processor
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-metrics-collector
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
    tier: monitoring
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
        tier: monitoring
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: metrics-collector-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10002
        runAsGroup: 10002
        fsGroup: 10002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: metrics-collector
          image: registry.example.com/metrics-collector:2.1.0@sha256:def789ghi012
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
              name: metrics
            - containerPort: 9091
              protocol: UDP
              name: statsd
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
              add:
                - NET_BIND_SERVICE
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          env:
            - name: COLLECTOR_PORT
              value: "9090"
            - name: STATSD_PORT
              value: "9091"
            - name: FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS
              value: "100"
            - name: API_TOKEN
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: metrics-collector-secrets
                  key: api-token
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: buffer-volume
              mountPath: /var/buffer
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "50Mi"
        - name: buffer-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "200Mi"
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: metrics-collector
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-cache
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: direct-cache
    tier: caching
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-cache
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-cache
        tier: caching
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: direct-cache-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10003
        runAsGroup: 10003
        fsGroup: 10003
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: direct-cache
          image: registry.example.com/direct-cache:3.0.1@sha256:ghi345jkl678
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              protocol: TCP
              name: cache
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "2Gi"
          env:
            - name: CACHE_PORT
              value: "6379"
            - name: MAX_MEMORY
              value: "1536mb"
            - name: CACHE_AUTH_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: direct-cache-secrets
                  key: auth-password
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: data-volume
              mountPath: /data
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "50Mi"
        - name: data-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "2Gi"
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: direct-cache
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: data-processor-sa
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: data-processor
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-sa
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: direct-cache-sa
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: direct-cache
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: data-processor-netpol
  namespace: high-performance
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-processor
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: high-performance
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              tier: backend
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: high-performance
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-netpol
  namespace: high-performance
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: high-performance
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9090
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 9091
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: high-performance
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: direct-cache-netpol
  namespace: high-performance
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-cache
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: high-performance
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              tier: backend
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
